sessionStart.bash: HOOK=$(python3 -c 'import json, os, pathlib; base = pathlib.Path(os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR", "")).expanduser() if os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR") else pathlib.Path.home() / ".copilot"; root = base / "installed-plugins"; print(next((str(manifest.parent / "scripts" / "hook.py") for manifest in root.glob("**/plugin.json") if json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("name") == "durable-ledger"), ""))') && [ -n "$HOOK" ] && python3 "$HOOK" session-start
sessionStart.comment: Initialize durable-ledger session state and append session-start records.

userPromptSubmitted.bash: HOOK=$(python3 -c 'import json, os, pathlib; base = pathlib.Path(os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR", "")).expanduser() if os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR") else pathlib.Path.home() / ".copilot"; root = base / "installed-plugins"; print(next((str(manifest.parent / "scripts" / "hook.py") for manifest in root.glob("**/plugin.json") if json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("name") == "durable-ledger"), ""))') && [ -n "$HOOK" ] && python3 "$HOOK" user-prompt-submitted
userPromptSubmitted.comment: Append user-turn ledger records for each submitted prompt.

preToolUse.bash: HOOK=$(python3 -c 'import json, os, pathlib; base = pathlib.Path(os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR", "")).expanduser() if os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR") else pathlib.Path.home() / ".copilot"; root = base / "installed-plugins"; print(next((str(manifest.parent / "scripts" / "hook.py") for manifest in root.glob("**/plugin.json") if json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("name") == "durable-ledger"), ""))') && [ -n "$HOOK" ] && python3 "$HOOK" pre-tool-use
preToolUse.comment: Append tool-call ledger records before tool execution.

postToolUse.bash: HOOK=$(python3 -c 'import json, os, pathlib; base = pathlib.Path(os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR", "")).expanduser() if os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR") else pathlib.Path.home() / ".copilot"; root = base / "installed-plugins"; print(next((str(manifest.parent / "scripts" / "hook.py") for manifest in root.glob("**/plugin.json") if json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("name") == "durable-ledger"), ""))') && [ -n "$HOOK" ] && python3 "$HOOK" post-tool-use
postToolUse.comment: Append tool-result ledger records after tool execution.

errorOccurred.bash: HOOK=$(python3 -c 'import json, os, pathlib; base = pathlib.Path(os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR", "")).expanduser() if os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR") else pathlib.Path.home() / ".copilot"; root = base / "installed-plugins"; print(next((str(manifest.parent / "scripts" / "hook.py") for manifest in root.glob("**/plugin.json") if json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("name") == "durable-ledger"), ""))') && [ -n "$HOOK" ] && python3 "$HOOK" error-occurred
errorOccurred.comment: Append error ledger records for agent execution failures.

sessionEnd.bash: HOOK=$(python3 -c 'import json, os, pathlib; base = pathlib.Path(os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR", "")).expanduser() if os.environ.get("COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR") else pathlib.Path.home() / ".copilot"; root = base / "installed-plugins"; print(next((str(manifest.parent / "scripts" / "hook.py") for manifest in root.glob("**/plugin.json") if json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("name") == "durable-ledger"), ""))') && [ -n "$HOOK" ] && python3 "$HOOK" session-end
sessionEnd.comment: Append session-end records and clear active session state.
